## Emerald 1.5.0

A big mascot release ‚Äî bring your own creatures *and* images ‚Äî plus a fresh app
icon, more shortcuts, and live vault syncing.

### New
- **A brand-new app icon.** A commissioned emerald-crystal-on-books icon now
  ships on Linux, macOS and Windows (and as the in-app window icon).
- **Mascots ‚Äî bring your own creatures.** A hand-drawn SVG mascot engine sits
  alongside the procedural creatures. Drop a folder of SVG layers into your
  mascots folder (`creatures/<name>/body.svg`, plus optional
  `topper`/`eyes`/`mouth`/‚Ä¶ layers) and Emerald auto-discovers it and rolls your
  creature into the mix ‚Äî no rebuild. The chosen creature is recorded in the
  note so it stays reproducible and travels with the file.
- **Mascots ‚Äî bring your own images.** Prefer hand-drawn or AI-generated art?
  Drop square images (PNG/JPG/WEBP) into an `images/` folder inside your mascots
  folder and switch on **Use Image Mascots** in the gear menu ‚Äî each note then
  shows one of your images, picked by its seed, as a rounded tile instead of the
  procedural creature.
- **Mascot shortcuts & gallery.** `Ctrl+M` generate/re-roll, `Ctrl+Shift+M`
  delete, `Ctrl+G` open the vault-wide gallery ‚Äî now with larger, clearer
  thumbnails.
- **Sidebar toggle.** `Ctrl+\` collapses and restores the left pane (or click
  the divider).
- **Live vault syncing.** External changes on disk ‚Äî new/renamed/deleted notes
  and edits to the open note ‚Äî now update the tree and editor live.

### Changed / Fixes
- **Delete sticks.** With auto-generation on, deleting a note's mascot no longer
  lets it auto-recreate for that note; generate one by hand (`Ctrl+M`) to resume.
- Math rendering: better sizing and strikethrough handling.
- macOS keyboard shortcuts now map correctly (`Ctrl` ‚Üí ‚åò).
- The caret position is restored when you reopen a note.
- Fixed a fold-related crash, plus table and math edge cases, and the current
  selection now reveals its raw Markdown source cleanly.

### Downloads
| Platform | File | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Linux (x86-64) | `Emerald-x86_64.AppImage` | `chmod +x` and run |
| Linux (ARM64)  | `Emerald-aarch64.AppImage` | `chmod +x` and run ¬∑ glibc ‚â• 2.39 |
| macOS (universal) | `Emerald-macOS.dmg` | drag to Applications; first launch **right-click ‚Üí Open ‚Üí Open**. If still blocked: `xattr -cr /Applications/emerald.app` |
| Windows | `Emerald-win64.zip` | extract and run `emerald.exe` |

Every download bundles its own Qt runtime ‚Äî nothing else to install. Built
automatically by the `Release` GitHub Actions workflow.
